name: ANNOUNCEMENT (via DSCC)
subject: 🔥 WOW! (what Bernie Sanders did today) 🔥
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Senate Republicans just took steps to repeal Obamacare, end Medicare as we know it, and defund Planned Parenthood. Democrats must fight back NOW... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686964/336493771/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170115-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- Did you see the news?

Democratic Members of Congress (including Bernie Sanders!), advocacy groups, progressive leaders, and hardworking everyday Americans are standing together today at rallies across the country to fight to protect health care reform.

It's a sharp contrast to what Senate Republicans did in the dead of night last week -- voting to repeal Obamacare with NO replacement.

To put it simply, these right-wing extremists just took the first steps to throw THIRTY MILLION people off their current coverage, abandon seniors by ending Medicare as we know it, make massive cuts to Medicaid, and defund Planned Parenthood even as millions of women rely on it.

It's why Democrats are fighting back. And why we're asking you to join those rallying today.

[**Friend, will you add your name to stand with the thousands who are rallying to help Democrats save health care? Join us as we fight to protect millions of Americans >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686964/336493771/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170115-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name:** Friend
****Last Petition Signed** : **N/A
****Protect Obamcare:**[**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686964/336493771/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170115-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV")**

Donald Trump has teamed up with Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan to make repealing Obamacare the number one priority of their first month in office -- and they've already started! With inauguration only days away, we're asking grassroots Democrats in communities across the country to step up and protect the millions of Americans who rely on Obamacare to stay healthy.

So if you couldn't make it to one of today's rallies, you can still join your fellow Democrats in fighting to save health care. [**Friend, please add your name to say you 're all-in to fight the GOP in Congress and ultimately save health care in America >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686964/336493771/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170115-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV")

Thanks for joining this fight,
Team DSCC

P.S. Has Obamacare impacted your own life? **[Please take a moment to share your story here and let us know what repealing Obamacare would mean to you and your family.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686964/336493771/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-obamacare?source=PT-20170115-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV")

**A quick note on donations, Friend:****

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[****Contribute****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170115-AnnouncementDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686966/336493771/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686961/336493771/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954edc5/2b07114c/46442dc9/73686960/336493771/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Republican Party of New Hampshire
subject: Annual Meeting Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
This is the second reminder that the 2017 NHGOP Annual Meeting
will be Saturday, January 28th, at Pinkerton Academy in Derry.

The Meeting will begin promptly at 9am, with registration from
7:30am to 10:00am.

All information, including procedure for officer nominations,
bylaw amendments, and tickets for non-members, can be found by
visiting http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurizz43bMv-2BKqYUN0MJc4wW77VsDPxf9Ap0uHcSGFen-2Bc_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MdUbwPcMc-2FB5yQvLeLPeVN4vhjb2XsV122rBPg9JUrHZYsCyAMqATNu1LldPkign-2FoaxGjtd0fy56RrpHb5wUVbZ2EPa71HYIy3wEfz-2B5KIHYkJosCmpkFHHI7f2Xr9LyRsMaVhTNkMovlry6X0irIwvgZDfyRpiIYPyguyx3v2k0H2-2BXFfzicP7QWXDna3Nv3UAJGgI-2FtWtlyN-2FNRy5qMaHDg0xlEOXMhyaBf83co-2FxqUAvCJ-2Bv911SokA1EeIBERvLi5I-2FSXFPHRkny-2BaNkzw-3D-3D ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurizz43bMv-2BKqYUN0MJc4wW77VsDPxf9Ap0uHcSGFen-2Bc_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MdUbwPcMc-2FB5yQvLeLPeVN4vhjb2XsV122rBPg9JUrHZYsCyAMqATNu1LldPkign-2FoaxGjtd0fy56RrpHb5wUVQT-2Bpbi-2FlOvaYoK4l6WfM0BXvk1pFBKXa19dOjkz39ijVg99YCQto-2BMa4Pg2HkvzK4YdmYQ8y-2Fn-2BvqnqeXHEbGPt51MUfCBBUT0WP-2Br7mcDz-2FE68yzMEgSAZDVa7tFaWGXBSoqghFpVPyf50YSAitPJpHHAZXw-2BKg0FnWdSn5dZIg7qLh9M1YPY1uH42KVnH-2FQ-3D-3D ).

1/19/2017.

The bylaw subcommittee will meet at 6:00pm on 1/19/2017 to review
and make recommendations to the Executive Committee.

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
10 Water Street, Concord, NH 03301 - Jennifer Horn, Chairman

The Meeting will begin promptly at 9am, with registration from 7:30am to 10:00am. All information, including procedure for officer nominations, bylaw amendments, and tickets for non-members, can be found by visiting ( ). name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Wow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
As we honor the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr this weekend, it is fitting that each of us recommit to taking up the torch of citizen action. We must each do our part to bend the arc of |
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b24/70cdc2ba/4745299f/397955b/1496263499/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ImIn?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em011617&source=em011617") Friend,

Wow! Thank you for the incredible response to our appeal to join Maryland's First Stand Rally to Save Health Care yesterday.

As we honor the life and legacy of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr this weekend, it is fitting that each of us recommit to taking up the torch of citizen action. We must each do our part to bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice.

That is why it gave me great hope that close to 3000 of you came out to Bowie State University yesterday to show that Marylanders will not be bullied into silence on issues of importance. We will stand up for our values and fight tooth-and-nail against the threats to turn the clock back on progress in our country.

Yesterday's crowd at our Maryland Save Health Care Rally spilled out of the doors of the student center, into a large overflow room and out the front steps of the building. It was a demonstration of citizen activism at its best -- and what we can achieve when we work together.

Remember -- we need just 3 Republican senators to join 48 Members of the Senate Democratic Caucus to stop the reckless plan to eliminate the Affordable Care Act with nothing to put in its place. **[If you haven't already, please join us in this fight by contacting people you know in every state in the nation to hold their senators accountable in this fight to save health care. Click here to find that list of senators.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b24/70cdc2ba/4745299f/3979558/1496263499/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/ImIn?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+If+you+havenrsquot+already+please+join+u&utm_campaign=em011617&source=em011617")**

This is an important moment. Our democracy will be tested in the weeks and months ahead and we need to stand up for what is right.

If we all do our part, we will win this fight!

Thank you for all you do.

Onwards!

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b24/70cdc2ba/4745299f/3979559/1496263499/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em011617&source=em011617")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b24/70cdc2ba/4745299f/3979556/1496263499/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em011617&source=em011617") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
